subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I beseech Thee by the hem of Thy grandeur and cling to the fringes of the garment of Thy splendor, and I supplicate Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اتوسل بذیل کبریائک و اتعلق باهداب ردآء بهائک و اتضرع الیک
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
